name: Typebot Connector
description: Runs a Typebot flow as the brain of a WhatsApp bot: inbound messages drive a Typebot chat session via the live Chat API, and the bot's text/media bubbles and inputs (rendered as numbered choices) are sent back to WhatsApp. Auto-starts every chat, supports media and file-upload steps, and resets when the flow ends or after an idle timeout. Runs sandboxed in the plugin worker; no public URL or webhook required.
author: Yudhi Armyndharis <yudhi@rmyndharis.com>

apiHost.title: Typebot host URL
apiHost.description: Public https URL of your Typebot (Cloud https://typebot.io, or a public-domain self-hosted install). Its host is auto-added to this plugin's outbound allowlist. Private/LAN hosts are not supported.

publicId.title: Typebot public ID
publicId.description: The published bot's public identifier (from its Share settings). The bot must be published.

apiToken.title: API token
apiToken.description: Only needed for a restricted or preview bot. Leave empty for a public published bot.

respondInGroups.title: Respond in group chats
respondInGroups.description: Run the flow in group chats too. Each sender in a group gets their own flow; replies are quoted.

sessionTimeoutMinutes.title: Idle reset (minutes)
sessionTimeoutMinutes.description: If a chat is idle this long, the next message starts a fresh flow.

passContactVariables.title: Pass contact variables
passContactVariables.description: Send the contact's number/name/chat id to the flow as prefilled variables named waNumber, waName, waChatId.

mediaHost.title: Media/upload host
mediaHost.description: Only for older self-hosted Typebot that uploads files to a separate S3/MinIO host. Leave empty for Typebot main (same-origin upload proxy).
